lsp session.jsonl
stdout '"name":"Login opportunity tree"'
stdout '"name":"Outcome"'

stdout '"insertTextFormat":2'
stdout '"label":"GIVEN field"'
stdout '"label":"## Experiments"'
stdout '"label":"experiment field"'

stdout 'Opportunity Solution Tree extension'
